_comment: Inventory of CraftPix TDS assets vs CTU engine hooks. Paths relative to repo root unless noted.

movement.description: Infantry 'walking' is the run clip: CraftPix separates legs (walk cycle) from upper-body weapon poses.
availableNotUsed: soldiers PNG/Shadows/legs1..7.png — shadow-only walk strips (could composite under units)
city tile Source/ — not unit movement
movement.engineNote: Units interpolate grid-to-grid (lerp). Longer moves now use duration scaled by Manhattan distance so run cycles are visible.

combatUnitPoses.implemented: craftpixClips idle | run | shot/shoot | dead | prone (sniper) in spriteAnimations.json
combatUnitPoses.recentEngineFix: During _fireVisualUntil, pickClip now plays attackClip (shot/shoot) for infantry and shot for tread vehicles.

muzzleAndProjectileOverlays.legacyPlaceholder: attached_assets/vfx/*.png — empty except .gitkeep; prefer CraftPix paths above

worldExplosionsAndSmoke.explosionShadows: craftpix_pack/city/PNG City/Shadows/Explosion{n}_*.png — not composited (could layer under blast)

vehicles.acsTank: vehicles/acs_tank_damage/Source/ACS_Base.png, ACS_Tower.png, ACS_Preview.png — opfor HD; no multi-frame tread animation in pack
vehicles.damageStates: acs_tank_damage README expects damage sheets — not present beyond Source trio

otherPacks.boats: boats/ — not mapped to game units
otherPacks.city_buildings: destructible tiles / world — partial via scenarios
otherPacks.hud: hud/ — menu chrome, not battle canvas
otherPacks.shadows: craftpix_pack/shadows/ — unit shadow sprites not auto-applied in UnitRenderer
